steps.title: Translate the product
steps.content:
The number that is $7$ more than $x$ is $x+7$. Their product is $228$, so
$$
x(x+7)=228
$$

steps.title: Test the positive choice
steps.content: Use the positive value that makes the product work: $$ 12(12+7)=12(19)=228 $$ So $x=12$. The answer is B.
